item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin - 06/18/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 133 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors and Downtown Tiffin are excited to invite the community to a special ribbon cutting ceremony celebrating the installation of the new Love Lock structure located at the East Green at National Corner adjacent to the Splash Pad. The event will take place on Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 4 PM and is open to the public. The Love Lock structure was created through the efforts of the Downtown Tiffin Design Committee as part of Downtown Tiffin’s ongoing beautification initiatives, including the Best Foot Forward Program and the Golden Broom Award. These programs encourage businesses and property owners to maintain attractive storefronts and contribute to the overall appearance and vibrancy of the downtown district. The Design Committee also helps organize Downtown Clean Ups and other aesthetic improvement efforts throughout the community. Inspired by the Pont des Arts Love Lock Bridge in Paris, France, as well as similar installations found in Main Street communities across the country, the Downtown Tiffin Love Lock structure gives couples an opportunity to symbolize their love by attaching a lock to the structure and tossing the key into a designated key box attached nearby. The structure was generously donated by Price Manufacturing and will serve as a unique new attraction and photo opportunity in Downtown Tiffin, featuring the East Tower as a scenic backdrop. Located near the amphitheater, the East Green has become a gathering place for couples and families attending concerts and community events. It also holds special meaning as the location where couples were married during the memorable 2024 Total Eclipse celebration. Community members are encouraged to attend the ribbon cutting, celebrate this new addition to Downtown Tiffin, and learn more about how Downtown Tiffin continues to create welcoming and memorable public spaces for residents and visitors alike.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include love lock structure and History & Museums.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin - 06/18/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 133 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors and Downtown Tiffin are excited to invite the community to a special ribbon cutting ceremony celebrating the installation of the new Love Lock structure located at the East Green at National Corner adjacent to the Splash Pad. The event will take place on Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 4 PM and is open to the public. The Love Lock structure was created through the efforts of the Downtown Tiffin Design Committee as part of Downtown Tiffin’s ongoing beautification initiatives, including the Best Foot Forward Program and the Golden Broom Award. These programs encourage businesses and property owners to maintain attractive storefronts and contribute to the overall appearance and vibrancy of the downtown district. The Design Committee also helps organize Downtown Clean Ups and other aesthetic improvement efforts throughout the community. Inspired by the Pont des Arts Love Lock Bridge in Paris, France, as well as similar installations found in Main Street communities across the country, the Downtown Tiffin Love Lock structure gives couples an opportunity to symbolize their love by attaching a lock to the structure and tossing the key into a designated key box attached nearby. The structure was generously donated by Price Manufacturing and will serve as a unique new attraction and photo opportunity in Downtown Tiffin, featuring the East Tower as a scenic backdrop. Located near the amphitheater, the East Green has become a gathering place for couples and families attending concerts and community events. It also holds special meaning as the location where couples were married during the memorable 2024 Total Eclipse celebration. Community members are encouraged to attend the ribbon cutting, celebrate this new addition to Downtown Tiffin, and learn more about how Downtown Tiffin continues to create welcoming and memorable public spaces for residents and visitors alike.
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include attractive storefronts and Causes.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/19/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/19/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 19, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer fun.

item.title: Tiffin Moose All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1146 OH-53, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday June 20th: Is our MONTHLY All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet. Spread the word ! $10 adults. $5 ages 6-10. Ages 5 and below, Free.
item.dc:creator: The Tiffin Moose - Lodge 846
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin Moose All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include ages 6-10 and breakfast buffet.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include chocolate covered strawberry cups and farmers market.

item.title: 2nd Annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back Cruisin' into Summer Jeep and Car Show - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 69 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the second annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back car show and fundraiser on Saturday, June 20th, from 9am to 1pm. Free admission for spectators $15 registration per show vehicle Awards given for multiple categories One free slice of pizza per person 50/50 door prize drawing Various raffles Purchase tickets for an opportunity to win: 1 free 14" 1-item pizza per week for one year 1 free 1-item jumbo per month for one year Bring your classic, custom or offroad vehicle. This is a fundraiser for the soon-to-be built Heavenly Park. Register your vehicle at: https://tinyurl.com/HeavenlyGivesBackCarShow26
item.dc:creator: Heavenly Pizza-Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2nd Annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back Cruisin' into Summer Jeep and Car Show on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include raffles and seasonal.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and artisan sourdough.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

item.title: 2026 VetFest - 06/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 167 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Another year of bringing Veterans and Community together through music and fun! This years event will feature multiple bands and food as normal. We are working diligently to make this event better than the last. This feed and outline will be updated as we move forward.
item.dc:creator: Dress, Right, Dress
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 VetFest on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Causes and bands.

item.title: Digging Vintage: A Potting Event for Vintage Enthusiasts - 06/20/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Spend some time at Washington Street Outfitters during Tiffin’s Night Farmer’s Market. Choose from our largest selection of vintage vessels to plant your choice of house plants & succulents. Your experience includes food & mocktails! Potting Packages will range from $16-$60 depending on what you choose. Our Team will guide you through creating the safest foundations for vintage planters & their new plant friends to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Digging Vintage: A Potting Event for Vintage Enthusiasts on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include house plants and mocktails.

item.title: Night Farmers Market - 06/20/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 205 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA First Night Market to kick off the Concert Series
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Night Farmers Market on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include first night market and Markets.

item.title: Night Farmers Market - 06/20/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 205 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA First Night Market to kick off the Concert Series
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Night Farmers Market on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Markets and concert series.

item.title: Out of Eden-A Tribute To The Eagles Summer Concert - 06/20/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 167 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for a great night of classic rock in Downtown Tiffin! Join us for Out of Eden – A Tribute to the Eagles on Saturday, June 20 at 7:00 PM at the East Green Amphitheatre. Sing along to all your favorite Eagles hits in a fun outdoor concert atmosphere with friends, family, and the community. This is a free community concert sponsored by Simply Shop Local, celebrating summer and supporting our local businesses. Bring a chair or blanket, enjoy the evening, and experience the music that defined a generation right here in Tiffin. Rain Location: If the weather doesn’t cooperate, the concert will move to The Ritz Theatre in Downtown Tiffin. Mark your calendar, invite your friends, and come celebrate the sounds of the Eagles with us!
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Out of Eden-A Tribute To The Eagles Summer Concert on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and outdoor atmosphere.

Sing along to all your favorite Eagles hits in a fun outdoor concert atmosphere with friends, family, and the community. This is a free community concert sponsored by Simply Shop Local, celebrating summer and supporting our local businesses. Bring a chair or blanket, enjoy the evening, and experience the music that defined a generation right here in Tiffin. Rain Location: If the weather doesn’t cooperate, the concert will move to The Ritz Theatre in Downtown Tiffin. Mark your calendar, invite your friends, and come celebrate the sounds of the Eagles with us!
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Out of Eden-A Tribute To The Eagles Summer Concert on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and Outdoors.

item.title: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 - 06/21/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 79 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Save the dates for Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026! Get ready to celebrate the flavors of the season with Taste of Summer Seneca County, returning June 21 to 28, 2026! This weeklong culinary event invites locals and visitors to explore limited-time, summer-inspired specials from restaurants, cafés, bakeries, bars, food trucks, and more across the county. From refreshing drinks to seasonal dishes and sweet treats, Taste of Summer highlights the delicious diversity of Seneca County’s food scene while encouraging guests to visit new places and support local businesses. The more locations your support, the more prizes you'll win! Details on prized and locations coming soon, stay tuned!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include food scene and local businesses.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/21/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/21/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/22/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Health & Fitness and Science & Tech.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/22/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Defiance Hospital
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quality care and Health & Fitness.

item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Springfield
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quality care and Health & Fitness.

item.title: Good Morning Hike - 06/22/2026 8:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Fort Seneca, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we explore the trails to appreciate what nature has to offer on this good morning.   This walk will last about 1 ¼ hour and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Good Morning Hike on Jun 22, 2026 in Fort Seneca, OH. Featured themes include walking stick program and Outdoors.
